title: Analyzing Slope
text: To determine if the function is increasing or decreasing, we should analyze its slope. The slope of a linear function $$f(x)=mx+b$$ is given by the coefficient $$m$$.

title: Identifying the Slope
text: What is the slope of the linear function $$a(x)=5-2x$$?

title: Increasing vs. Decreasing
text: If slope $$m>0$$, the function is increasing. If slope $$m<0$$, the function is decreasing.
